description: Execute V0.8 Docs Archon Upgrade: Replace all placeholder documentation with comprehensive, Archon-standard content in English and Chinese. Inject actual JSON schemas from the schemas/ directory, provide at least 3 concrete YAML workflow examples, and detail precise CLI/Git team collaboration instructions.
scope: 1. Scan documentation/EN and documentation/ZH for files containing placeholder text (e.g., *(Content in progress...)*). 2. Rewrite these files with deep technical and operational content. 3. Include schemas/execution-contract.schema.json, review-decision.schema.json, etc., into the Reference section. 4. Detail 'assist.yaml', 'feature-development.yaml', and a custom workflow. 5. Explicitly document the Dual-Tiered Sync Git commands (e.g., git checkout agent-sync).
out_of_scope: Strictly NO modifications to src/ or bin/ logic. NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json state semantics outside of this patch progression. NO implementation of runtime execution code. This is an amendment to V0.8 documentation only.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify source code in src/ or bin/.
